children.heading: .—Construction of “First Became a Member”
children.label: a .—Construction of “First Became a Member”
children.text: For purposes of this chapter and other provisions of law providing for computation of retired or retainer pay of members of the uniformed services, a person shall be considered to first become a member of a uniformed service on the date the person is first enlisted, inducted, or appointed in a uniformed service.

children.heading: .—References in Tables
children.label: b .—References in Tables
children.text: Section references in tables in this chapter are to sections of this title.
